summary: Light Therapy module comprehensive frontend testing complete. 15/15 tests passed. All new features working correctly: multi-color selection (up to 3), blend indicator, audio toggle (Web Audio API), frequency display, immersive session with breathing orb, timer, pause/end controls, and multi-color gradient layers.

minor.issue: 401 errors for unauthenticated requests - expected behavior for protected endpoints (Light Therapy works without auth)

test_credentials: Not required - Light Therapy works without authentication
context_for_next_testing_agent: Light Therapy module at /light-therapy fully functional. Multi-select up to 3 colors working. Blend indicator shows color dots + blended result. Audio toggle (Sound On/Sound Off) controls Web Audio API oscillators. Frequency display shows Hz values for selected colors. Immersive session has breathing orb, timer, pause/end controls, and multi-color gradient layers. Colors render TRUE (red=red, blue=blue) with no hue rotation. Black background maintained as pure chromotherapy canvas.

tests_executed.details: Color selector found with all 7 colors: red, orange, yellow, green, blue, indigo, violet
Clicking red shows 'Red — Vitality' title, description, benefits, chakra info (256Hz — Root Chakra)

tests_executed.test: 3. Audio toggle appears when colors selected
tests_executed.details: Audio toggle button shows 'Sound On' when color selected
Title changes to 'Blended Light', frequency shows '256Hz + 384Hz — Harmonic Blend'
Blend indicator shows color dots + blended result circle
Clicking selected color removes it, other colors become clickable again (opacity ~1)
All 5 duration buttons found (3, 5, 10, 15, 20 min), selection works
Single color: 'Immerse in Red', Multiple: 'Immerse in 2-Color Blend'
Full-screen session with breathing orb, timer (9:59), pause/end controls
Shows '384Hz · Throat Chakra (Vishuddha)', '341Hz · Heart Chakra (Anahata)' for selected colors

tests_executed.test: 13. End session returns to color selection
tests_executed.details: Clicking 'End Session' returns to color selection view
Toggle switches between 'Sound On' and 'Sound Off'

feature_verification.multi_select_colors: WORKING - Up to 3 colors can be selected
feature_verification.blend_indicator: WORKING - Shows color dots + blended result when 2+ colors selected
feature_verification.audio_toggle: WORKING - Web Audio API oscillators controlled by Sound On/Off button
feature_verification.frequency_display: WORKING - Shows Hz values (e.g., '256Hz + 384Hz — Harmonic Blend')
feature_verification.dimmed_state: WORKING - Unselected colors dimmed (opacity ~0.3) when 3 selected
feature_verification.immersive_session: WORKING - Full-screen with breathing orb, timer, multi-color gradients
feature_verification.session_controls: WORKING - Pause/Resume and End Session buttons functional
feature_verification.chakra_info: WORKING - Shows chakra and Hz info for all selected colors in session
feature_verification.true_colors: WORKING - Colors render correctly (red=red, blue=blue) with no hue rotation
feature_verification.black_background: WORKING - Pure black (#000) chromotherapy canvas maintained
